Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Continued To Jul-23-15 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Battel for and with (Petitioner) Teresa Chan and (surviving spouse) Ngo Thi. Vance Chang for (Respondents) Tzei Yiou Chen & Chau Hung Chong.

Ms. Battel stated that she believes the direct beneficiary is the surviving spouse, that they have filed a waiver of bond, that currently there are no assets in the estate, that they are not sure that they can recover any assets and do not know if the stamps have been sold. Mr. Chang stated that they object to the filing of the pendency of action and that if it goes through they will request that bond be posted. Ms. Battel stated that they will remove the pendency petition if the assets are held in a trust. Mr. Chang stated that he has filed a Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens, that the funds came from a legitimate source and not the decedent and that they will transfer the possession of the stamps. Ms. Battel stated that they are willing to be appointed with a narrower scope of powers. The Petition for letters of administration was taken under submission subject to modification of the order.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
